title: Revised Competence, Training & Awareness Procedure v3.1
description: Updated procedure covering competence assessment, training needs identification, and awareness communication requirements for all employees.
trigger: Procedure revision cycle — CTA-PRO-001 v3.1 issued

title: Welding Procedure Revision Briefing — WPS-2026-04
description: Briefing on revised welding procedure specification WPS-2026-04 covering joint preparation, preheat requirements, and post-weld inspection criteria.
trigger: WPS revision — WPS-2026-04 approved by QA

title: Robot Cell Safety and Operation Briefing
description: Safety and operation briefing for the new robot cell installation, covering safe working distances, emergency stop procedures, and operator qualification requirements.
trigger: New equipment introduction — robot cell EC-2026-001 commissioned

title: Materials Testing Method Update — Tensile Test ISO 6892
description: Update on revised tensile testing method requirements per ISO 6892-1:2019, including revised sample preparation and reporting requirements.
trigger: ISO standard update — ISO 6892-1:2019 implementation deadline

title: Customer Quality Requirement Alert — Batch Traceability
description: Customer-driven quality requirement update mandating full batch traceability records for all supplied components. Affects QA inspection sign-off and production documentation.
trigger: Customer requirement change — client CR-2026-009 received

title: Updated NCR Escalation Process
description: Revised non-conformance escalation process introducing time-bound escalation triggers, mandatory CAPA linkage, and supervisor sign-off requirements.
trigger: Procedure revision — CTA-QUA-003 v2.0 issued following audit finding AF-2025-018

title: New AM Cell Start-up Safety Communication
description: Formal safety communication and retraining requirement for the new additive manufacturing cell, covering powder handling, inert gas safety, and equipment start-up procedures.
trigger: New equipment introduction — AM cell installation EC-2026-003
